properties.Test Case: Add a picture from a b&w line drawing that has been saved as a tiff. Should convert to PNG.
properties.Steps: Add a picture from a b&w line drawing that has been saved as a tiff. Should convert to PNG.

properties.Test Case: Add a picture from a crisp b&w line drawing that has been saved as a JPG (Bloom should show a warning)
properties.Steps: Add a picture from a crisp b&w line drawing that has been saved as a JPG (Bloom should show a warning)

properties.Test Case: Add a picture from a photograph that has been saved as a JPG
properties.Steps: Add a picture from a photograph that has been saved as a JPG

properties.Test Case: Add a picture from a photograph that has been saved as a PNG. Confirm that Bloom silently converts to jpg. [fixed in 5.0]. Update: willing to live with BL-12400 for now.
properties.Steps: Add a picture from a photograph that has been saved as a PNG. Confirm that Bloom silently converts to jpg. [fixed in 5.0]. Update: willing to live with BL-12400 for now.

properties.Test Case: In File Explorer, copy an image (CTRL C) which requires shrinking. In Bloom, do a paste. It should use the path on the clipboard to import the file. Bloom shouldn't delete the image.
properties.Steps: In File Explorer, copy an image (CTRL C) which requires shrinking. In Bloom, do a paste. It should use the path on the clipboard to import the file. Bloom shouldn't delete the image.
